items.title: All-in-One Asset Workbench
items.description: Centrally manage all your generated wallpaper assets in your personal workbench. Enjoy features like quick preview, parameter editing, batch downloading, and effortless deletion. With an intuitive grid view, your entire inspiration library is clear at a glance, making it easy to review and organize your creative journey.

items.title: Smart Async Task Management
items.description: We use advanced asynchronous processing mechanisms. Even when generating high-definition, complex AI wallpapers, your workflow will never be blocked. You can continue browsing other pages or queue up multiple generation tasks simultaneously, while seamlessly tracking the real-time progress of all your ongoing creations.

items.title: One-Click Publishing
items.description: Proud of your creation? Publish your masterpieces to the public gallery with a single click and share your unique aesthetics with the entire creative community. Your published works can be featured on recommendation lists, earning recognition, likes, and becoming an inspiring muse for creators worldwide.

items.title: Cloud Recycle Bin
items.description: Accidentally deleted a favorite wallpaper? No worries! All deleted assets are safely preserved in the cloud recycle bin. You can browse your deleted items anytime and restore them back to your workbench with a single click, or choose to empty the trash permanently to free up digital space.

howItWorks.title: How to make your own AI generated wallpaper?
howItWorks.subtitle: Just four steps to create a personalized 4K wallpaper

items.title: Enter your ideas
items.desc: Describe the wallpaper scene you want

items.title: Set ratio
items.desc: Specify aspect ratio (16:9, 9:16, 4:3 or custom), then click Generate to create your AI wallpaper

items.title: Select style
items.desc: Choose a style - select from 15+ art styles (like Pop Art, Cyberpunk, etc.)

items.title: Generate and Download
items.desc: Browse the unique digital art collection and instantly download your favorites. Use them as phone wallpapers, desktop themes, or even print them for custom home decor—easily infuse creativity into every screen and space

testimonials.title: Real User Reviews of AI Wallpaper Generator

items.name: Emma Carter
items.content: AI Wallpaper Generator is a game changer! In just minutes I created a stunning 4K nebula wallpaper for my gaming rig. Love the Cyberpunk Neon style that makes colors pop. Perfect aspect ratio customization saved me hours of editing time. Best tool for custom wallpapers!

items.name: Sarah Johnson
items.content: Finally found an AI art generator that understands device sizes. My iPhone 15 Pro Max wallpaper in Anime Cel-Shading style looks crisp at 9:16 ratio. HD quality rivals professional digital artwork. Art style diversity gets a 10/10!

items.name: Sophia Kaur
items.content: Created matching wallpapers for my iPad and desktop using the Impressionist brush style. 4:3 tablet ratio is perfect. Just wish there were more texture options, but 4K output quality is exceptional for home decor projects

items.name: Noah Jensen
items.content: Unbelievable how natural this deep sea blue whale wallpaper looks in 16:9 format. AI preserves details better than my Photoshop edits. Futuristic hologram style adds magical depth. Essential tool for those needing quick high-def backgrounds!

items.name: Isabella Rossi
items.content: Perfect for quick inspiration! Generated over 20 Pop Art fusion wallpapers before finalizing a design. Custom size feature saved my exhibition project. Hope to see more abstract styles, but current art styles are all outstanding

items.name: Raj Patel
items.content: Completely changed my workflow. Created minimalist geometric wallpapers for all team devices using custom ratios. 4K quality makes text/icons stand out clearly. Perfect balance between aesthetics and functionality. SEO tip: This should be #1 for 'custom AI wallpaper' searches!

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Contact our support team

items.a: Our AI engine defaults to 4K Ultra HD (3840×2160), optimized for all devices including iOS/Android smartphones, Windows/Mac computers, and foldable displays

items.q: How to create a mobile wallpaper?
items.a: 3 simple steps: 1) Enter description (e.g. 'anime girl under starry sky') 2) Choose from 15+ art styles 3) Generate & download. Vertical layout automatically adjusts to fit camera cutouts and screen edges
New users get 3 free generations. Premium members unlock unlimited exports, 8K upscaling, and 20+ exclusive filters, with monthly or annual subscription options
Use our AI upscaler to quadruple the resolution (400% upscale) while restoring details – perfect for restoring vintage photos or improving screenshots
4K wallpapers take 12-25 seconds to render using our GPU cluster. During peak hours, 95% of requests are completed within 30 seconds via smart queue optimization
Updated weekly with 8 categories: Cyberpunk, Ink painting, Flat illustration, etc. New dynamic lighting mode creates perfect 3D effects, ideal for AMOLED displays

items.q: How is this different from other AI tools?
items.a: We work with real artists to train styles – it's like having 8 professional illustrators in your pocket
Widescreen algorithms detect focus areas to preserve key visual elements. PSD files retain layers for easy post-generation Photoshop editing
